The other will be regulated as a rear yard (minimum 10 feet). The front yard shall be the yard adjacent to the <a class="def" href="5.10.326.5">front facade</a> of the <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-17" data-cite="DD-17"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-17.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.513">Maximum units per acre</a> is as follows:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-17a" data-cite="DD-17a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 1 zones, the <a class="def" href="5.10.513">maximum units per acre</a> is one <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-17b" data-cite="DD-17b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 4 zones, the <a class="def" href="5.10.513">maximum units per acre</a> is four <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling units</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-17c" data-cite="DD-17c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 6 zones, the <a class="def" href="5.10.513">maximum units per acre</a> is six <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling units</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-17d" data-cite="DD-17d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 8 zones, the <a class="def" href="5.10.513">maximum units per acre</a> is eight <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling units</a>.</p>



<p>Where the maximum number of units results in a fraction, the number shall be rounded up if the fraction is 0.50 or greater. In RSA 1, 4, 6 and 8 zones, not more than one <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a> may be on each <a class="def" href="5.10.480">lot</a>, regardless of the size of the <a class="def" href="5.10.480">lot</a>.</p>
</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-18" data-cite="DD-18"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-18.&#x2002;</span></span>Road <a class="def" href="5.10.195">dedication</a> and <a class="def" href="5.10.973">vehicular access easements</a> or tracts may be included in the density calculation, but not in the minimum <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a> per <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-19" data-cite="DD-19"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-19.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) allowed for the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> is as follows:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-19a" data-cite="DD-19a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 1 zones, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> is 20 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-19b" data-cite="DD-19b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 4 zones, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> is 50 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-19c" data-cite="DD-19c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 6 zones, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> is 50 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-19d" data-cite="DD-19d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>In RSA 8 zones, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> is 50 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>; provided, that <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> may be increased up to 60 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a> for the first 5,000 square feet of <a class="def" href="5.10.480">lot</a> area if, with the exception of <a class="def" href="5.10.015">accessory</a> features, all roof forms consist of ridgelines peaked near the center of the <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a>, with a minimum pitch of four feet vertical to 12 feet horizontal.</p>



</section>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> is not applicable for properties located within the jurisdiction of the <a class="def" href="5.10.837">Shoreline Management Act</a> regulated under Chapter <a class="cite" href="83" title="Ch. 83&#x2002;Shoreline Management">83</a> KZC.</p>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="115.42" title="115.42&#x2002;Floor Area Ratio (F.A.R.) Calculation for Dwelling Units in Low Density Residential Zones and Attached Dwelling Units in PLA 3C">115.42</a>, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) Calculation for <a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Units</a> in Low Density <a class="def" href="5.10.785">Residential Zones</a>, for additional information.</p>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-20" data-cite="DD-20"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-20.&#x2002;</span></span>For properties within the jurisdiction of the <a class="def" href="5.10.837">Shoreline Management Act</a> that have a shoreline setback requirement as established in Chapter <a class="cite" href="83" title="Ch. 83&#x2002;Shoreline Management">83</a> KZC and the setback requirement is met, the minimum required front yard is either: 10 feet or the average of the existing front yards on the properties abutting each side of the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a>. For the reduction in front yard, the shoreline setback is considered conforming if a reduction in the required shoreline setback is approved through KZC <a class="cite" href="83.380" title="83.380&#x2002;Shoreline Setback Reduction">83.380</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-21" data-cite="DD-21"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-21.&#x2002;</span></span>Maximum <a class="def" href="5.10.357">height of structure</a> for properties located within the Juanita Beach Camps Plat (Volume 32, Page 25 of King County Records) or the Carr&#x2019;s Park Plat (Unrecorded) shall be 35 feet above <a class="def" href="5.10.045">average building elevation</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-22" data-cite="DD-22"><p class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-22.&#x2002;</span></p>


<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-22a" data-cite="DD-22a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>For properties located south of the Lake Avenue West <a class="def" href="5.10.900">Street</a> End Park, the required front yard may be decreased to the average of the existing front yards on the properties abutting the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> to the north and south.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-22b" data-cite="DD-22b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The front <a class="def" href="5.10.775">required yard</a> provisions shall not apply to public <a class="def" href="5.10.900">street</a> ends located west of Waverly Way, but the <a class="def" href="5.10.775">required yard</a> shall be regulated as a side yard.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-22c" data-cite="DD-22c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.775">required yard</a> along the east side of the <a class="def" href="5.10.973">vehicular access easements</a> known as 5th Avenue West or Lake Avenue West is zero feet.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-22d" data-cite="DD-22d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.775">required yard</a> along the west side of the <a class="def" href="5.10.973">vehicular access easements</a> known as 5th Avenue West or Lake Avenue West is either five feet or the average of the existing rear yards on the properties abutting the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> to the north and south. The garage shall be located to comply with the provisions for parking pads contained in KZC <a class="cite" href="105.47" title="105.47&#x2002;Driveways in Low Density Zones">105.47</a>.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-23" data-cite="DD-23"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-23.&#x2002;</span></span>Five feet, but two side yards must equal at least 15 feet or five feet each if Special Regulation DD-24 is met.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-24" data-cite="DD-24"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-24.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.340">gross floor area</a> of any <a class="def" href="5.10.325">floor</a> above the first <a class="def" href="5.10.890">story</a> at <a class="def" href="5.10.900">street</a> or <a class="def" href="5.10.973">vehicular access easement</a> level shall be reduced by a minimum of 15 percent of the <a class="def" href="5.10.325">floor</a> area of the first <a class="def" href="5.10.890">story</a>, subject to the following conditions:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-24a" data-cite="DD-24a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> must conform to the standard shoreline setback requirements established in Chapter <a class="cite" href="83" title="Ch. 83&#x2002;Shoreline Management">83</a> KZC, or as otherwise approved under the shoreline setback reduction provisions established in KZC <a class="cite" href="83.380" title="83.380&#x2002;Shoreline Setback Reduction">83.380</a>.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-24b" data-cite="DD-24b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The required <a class="def" href="5.10.325">floor</a> area reductions shall be incorporated along the entire length of the facade of one or both facades facing the side <a class="def" href="5.10.720">property lines</a> in order to provide separation between neighboring residences.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-24c" data-cite="DD-24c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>Uncovered decks with solid railings located along the side <a class="def" href="5.10.720">property lines</a> on the upper <a class="def" href="5.10.325">floors</a> and covered decks shall be included in <a class="def" href="5.10.340">gross floor area</a> calculation.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-24d" data-cite="DD-24d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>This provision shall only apply if a residence has more than one <a class="def" href="5.10.890">story</a> above the <a class="def" href="5.10.900">street</a> or <a class="def" href="5.10.973">vehicular access easement</a> level, as measured at the midpoint of the frontage of the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> on the abutting <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a> (Plate <a class="cite" href="Plate36" title="Plate 36&#x2002;Story at Street or Access Easement Level">36</a>).</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-25" data-cite="DD-25"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-25.&#x2002;</span></span>For properties with a minimum of 45 feet of frontage along Lake Washington, 30 feet above <a class="def" href="5.10.045">average building elevation</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-26" data-cite="DD-26"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-26.&#x2002;</span></span>For the increase in height from 25 feet to 30 feet above <a class="def" href="5.10.045">average building elevation</a>, the <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> must conform to the standard shoreline setback requirements established in Chapter <a class="cite" href="83" title="Ch. 83&#x2002;Shoreline Management">83</a> KZC, or as otherwise approved under the shoreline setback provisions established in KZC <a class="cite" href="83.380" title="83.380&#x2002;Shoreline Setback Reduction">83.380</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-27" data-cite="DD-27"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-27.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) requirements of KZC <a class="cite" href="115.42" title="115.42&#x2002;Floor Area Ratio (F.A.R.) Calculation for Dwelling Units in Low Density Residential Zones and Attached Dwelling Units in PLA 3C">115.42</a> shall apply. The maximum <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> is 50 percent of the <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>; provided, that on <a class="def" href="5.10.480">lots</a> containing less than 7,200 square feet, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a> may be increased to 60 percent if:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-27a" data-cite="DD-27a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>With the exception of <a class="def" href="5.10.015">accessory</a> features, all roof forms consist of ridgelines peaked near the center of the <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a>, with a minimum pitch of four feet vertical to 12 feet horizontal; and</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-27b" data-cite="DD-27b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>A setback of at least 7.5 feet is provided along each side yard.</p>



<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="115.42" title="115.42&#x2002;Floor Area Ratio (F.A.R.) Calculation for Dwelling Units in Low Density Residential Zones and Attached Dwelling Units in PLA 3C">115.42</a>, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) calculation for <a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Units</a> in Low Density <a class="def" href="5.10.785">Residential Zones</a>, for additional information.</p>
</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-28" data-cite="DD-28"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-28.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) allowed for the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> is 60 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>.</p>



<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="115.42" title="115.42&#x2002;Floor Area Ratio (F.A.R.) Calculation for Dwelling Units in Low Density Residential Zones and Attached Dwelling Units in PLA 3C">115.42</a>, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) Calculation for <a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Units</a> in Low Density <a class="def" href="5.10.785">Residential Zones</a>, for additional information.</p>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-29" data-cite="DD-29"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-29.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) allowed for the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> is 20 percent of <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a>.</p>



<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="115.42" title="115.42&#x2002;Floor Area Ratio (F.A.R.) Calculation for Dwelling Units in Low Density Residential Zones and Attached Dwelling Units in PLA 3C">115.42</a>, <a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">Floor Area Ratio</a> (<a class="def" href="5.10.325.5">F.A.R.</a>) Calculation for <a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Units</a> in Low Density <a class="def" href="5.10.785">Residential Zones</a>, for additional information.</p>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-30" data-cite="DD-30"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-30.&#x2002;</span></span>If a <a class="def" href="5.10.505">Master Plan</a> is approved for the property, this use may have a <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a> of less than 35,000 square feet and must meet the following standards:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30a" data-cite="DD-30a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>The property must contain at least 16 contiguous acres.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30b" data-cite="DD-30b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>Residential <a class="def" href="5.10.480">lots</a> must contain a minimum area of 14,500 square feet capable of being used as a horse paddock area, which shall comply with KZC <a class="cite" href="115.20(5)" title="115.20(5)&#x2002;Horses">115.20(5)</a> for keeping of horses.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30c" data-cite="DD-30c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>The minimum <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a> allowed on the property shall be determined and approved as part of the <a class="def" href="5.10.505">Master Plan</a>. In no case shall the minimum <a class="def" href="5.10.482">lot size</a> be less than 26,000 square feet.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30d" data-cite="DD-30d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>A commercial <a class="def" href="5.10.285">equestrian</a> facility, including an arena, stables and paddock areas, must be provided on the property. The facility must be available to the public and not exclusively for the residences within the <a class="def" href="5.10.505">Master Plan</a>. The facility must meet requirements and special regulations as established for the use listing in this zone entitled &#x201C;Commercial <a class="def" href="5.10.285">Equestrian</a> Facility.&#x201D;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30e" data-cite="DD-30e"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">e.&#x2002;</span></span>An improved public <a class="def" href="5.10.285">equestrian</a> access trail and appropriate public <a class="def" href="5.10.845">signing</a> must be provided. The trail must be located and designed so as to allow for an eventual connection between NE 60th <a class="def" href="5.10.900">Street</a> and the Bridle Trails State and King County Parks.</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-30f" data-cite="DD-30f"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">f.&#x2002;</span></span>A coordinated vehicular and pedestrian circulation system for the property as well as other properties in the vicinity shall be provided as part of the Master Site Plan.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-31" data-cite="DD-31"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-31.&#x2002;</span></span>For <a class="def" href="5.10.824">school</a> use, <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> height may be increased, up to 35 feet, if:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-31a" data-cite="DD-31a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.824">school</a> can accommodate 200 or more students; and</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-31b" data-cite="DD-31b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The required side and rear yards for the portions of the <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> exceeding the basic maximum <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> height are increased by one foot for each additional one foot of <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> height; and</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-31c" data-cite="DD-31c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>The increased height is not specifically inconsistent with the applicable neighborhood plan provisions of the <a class="def" href="5.10.160">Comprehensive Plan</a>; and</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-31d" data-cite="DD-31d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>The increased height will not result in a <a class="def" href="5.10.910">structure</a> that is incompatible with surrounding uses or <a class="def" href="5.10.390">improvements</a>.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DDSubsec1" id="15.30-DD-32" data-cite="DD-32"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DD-32.&#x2002;</span></span>For those properties that conform to the standard shoreline setback requirements established in Chapter <a class="cite" href="83" title="Ch. 83&#x2002;Shoreline Management">83</a> KZC, either:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-32a" data-cite="DD-32a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>Ten feet; or</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.30-DD-32b" data-cite="DD-32b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The average of the existing front yards on the properties abutting the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> to the north and south. Otherwise, 20 feet. <span class="note history history--linked" data-action="click-&gt;levelnodes#openHistory">(Ord. 4913, 2025; Ord. 4844 &#xA7;&#xA0;1, 2023; Ord. 4811 &#xA7;&#xA0;1, 2022; Ord. 4703 &#xA7;&#xA0;1, 2019; Ord. 4506 &#xA7;&#xA0;2, 2015; Ord. 4476 &#xA7;&#xA0;2, 2015)</span></p>



</section>
</section>








</article>
<article class="level4 chunking-small type-Section has-history" id="15.40" data-cite="KZC 15.40" data-short-cite="15.40" data-history="/KZC/15.40/history"><header class=" mini-header" data-type="Section" data-search="/KZC/15.40/search" data-share="/KZC/15.40/share" data-levelnodes-target="header"><h4 class=" inner-header"><span class="num">15.40&#x2002;</span><span class="name">Development Standards.</span></h4></header><div class="track-indicator selected d-none">
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-check" aria-hidden="true"></span><span class="text">This section is included in your selections.</span>
</div>




<figure class="type-Table">
<table class="DevelopmentStandardsTable role-large table-dense table-extra-dense table-ruled-outside-both table-ruled-inside-both"><caption><p class="header"><span class="name">Development Standards Table&#xA0;&#x2013; Low Density Residential Zones (RS, RSX, RSA, WD II, PLA 3C, PLA 6E, PLA 16)</span></p>


<p class="center"><b>(Refer to KZC <a class="cite" href="15.20" title="15.20&#x2002;Permitted Uses">15.20</a>, Permitted Uses Table, to determine if a use is allowed in the zone; see also KZC <a class="cite" href="15.30" title="15.30&#x2002;Density/Dimensions">15.30</a>, Density/Dimensions Table)</b></p>
</caption><colgroup><col style="width: 100pt;"/><col style="width: 100pt;"/><col style="width: 100pt;"/><col style="width: 140pt;"/><col style="width: 180pt;"/>
</colgroup><tbody>
<tr>
<td rowspan="1" colspan="2">
<p><b>USE</b><br/>&#xA0;</p>
</td>
<td rowspan="1">
<p><b>Landscape Category</b></p>
<p><b>(Chapter <a class="cite" href="95" title="Ch. 95&#x2002;Tree Management and Required Landscaping">95</a> KZC)</b></p>
</td>
<td rowspan="1">
<p><b><a class="def" href="5.10.845">Sign</a> Category</b></p>
<p><b>(Chapter <a class="cite" href="100" title="Ch. 100&#x2002;Signs">100</a> KZC)</b></p>
</td>
<td rowspan="1">
<p><b>Required <a class="def" href="5.10.635">Parking Spaces</a></b></p>
<p><b>(Chapter <a class="cite" href="105" title="Ch. 105&#x2002;Parking Areas, Vehicle and Pedestrian Access, and Related Improvements">105</a> KZC)</b></p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.010</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.255">Attached Dwelling Units</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>E</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>A</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>2.0 per <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.020</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.299.6">Faith-Based Facility</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>C</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>1 for every 4 <a class="def" href="5.10.650">people</a> based on maximum occupancy load of any area of worship.<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-1" title="DS-1">1</a></sup></p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.030</p>
</th>
<th>
<p>Commercial <a class="def" href="5.10.285">Equestrian</a> Facility</p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>C<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-2" title="DS-2">2</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.040</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.140">Commercial Recreation Area and Use</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>C<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-2" title="DS-2">2</a>, <a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-3" title="DS-3">3</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.050</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.153">Community Facility</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>C<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-4" title="DS-4">4</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.060</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Unit</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>E</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>A</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>2.0 per <a class="def" href="5.10.250">dwelling unit</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.070</p>
</th>
<th>
<p>Golf Course</p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>E<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-14" title="DS-14">14</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.080</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.335">Government Facility</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>C<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-4" title="DS-4">4</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
<p><b>RSX, RSA: </b>B<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-5" title="DS-5">5</a>, <a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-9" title="DS-9">9</a></sup></p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.090</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.528">Mini-School</a> or <a class="def" href="5.10.527">Mini-Day-Care Center</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>E</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-6" title="DS-6">6</a></sup></p>
<p><b>PLA 16: </b>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-7" title="DS-7">7</a>, <a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-8" title="DS-8">8</a></sup></p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.100</p>
</th>
<th>
<p>Piers, Docks, Boat Lifts and Canopies Serving <a class="def" href="5.10.260">Detached Dwelling Unit</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>&#x2013;</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>&#x2013;</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>None</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.110</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.730">Public Park</a></p>
</th>
<td colspan="3">
<p>Development standards will be determined on a case-by-case basis.</p>
</td>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.120</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.745">Public Utility</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>A<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-4" title="DS-4">4</a></sup></p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.</p>
</th>
</tr>
<tr>
<th>
<p>15.40.130</p>
</th>
<th>
<p><a class="def" href="5.10.824">School</a> or <a class="def" href="5.10.192">Day-Care Center</a></p>
</th>
<td class="center">
<p>D</p>
</td>
<td class="center">
<p>B</p>
<p><b>RS, RSX, RSA: </b>B<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-5" title="DS-5">5</a>, <a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-10" title="DS-10">10</a></sup></p>
<p><b>PLA 3C, PLA 6E: </b>B<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-11" title="DS-11">11</a></sup></p>
</td>
<th>
<p>See KZC <a class="cite" href="105.25" title="105.25&#x2002;Number of Parking Spaces&#xA0;&#x2013; Not Specified in Use Zones">105.25</a>.<sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-8" title="DS-8">8</a>, <a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-12" title="DS-12">12</a></sup></p>
<p><b>PLA 3C: </b><sup><a class="cite" href="15.40-DS-13" title="DS-13">13</a></sup></p>
</th>
</tr>
</tbody></table>
</figure>
<p class="heading"><b>Development Standards (DS) Special Regulations:</b></p>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-1" data-cite="DS-1"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-1.&#x2002;</span></span>No parking is required for day-care or <a class="def" href="5.10.824">school</a> ancillary to the use.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-2" data-cite="DS-2"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-2.&#x2002;</span></span>Existing natural vegetation must be maintained to the greatest extent possible.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-3" data-cite="DS-3"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-3.&#x2002;</span></span>A 20-foot-wide sight-obscuring <a class="def" href="5.10.465">landscape</a> buffer must be provided along the west and south perimeter of the property.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-4" data-cite="DS-4"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-4.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.465">Landscape</a> Category A or B may be required depending on the type of use on the <a class="def" href="5.10.920">subject property</a> and the impacts associated with the use on the nearby uses.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-5" data-cite="DS-5"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-5.&#x2002;</span></span>One <a class="def" href="5.10.640">pedestal sign</a> with a <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> having electronic programming is allowed only if:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-5a" data-cite="DS-5a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>It is a <a class="def" href="5.10.640">pedestal sign</a> (see Plate <a class="cite" href="Plate12" title="Plate 12&#x2002;Pedestal Signs">12</a>) having a maximum of 40 square feet of <a class="def" href="5.10.850">sign area</a> per <a class="def" href="5.10.845">sign</a> face;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-5b" data-cite="DS-5b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> is no more than 50 percent of the <a class="def" href="5.10.850">sign area</a>;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-5c" data-cite="DS-5c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>Moving graphics and text or video are not part of the <a class="def" href="5.10.845">sign</a>;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-5d" data-cite="DS-5d"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">d.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> does not change text and/or images at a rate less than one every seven seconds and shall be readily legible given the text size and the speed limit of the adjacent <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a>;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-5e" data-cite="DS-5e"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">e.&#x2002;</span></span>The intensity of the display shall not produce <a class="def" href="5.10.330">glare</a> that extends to adjacent properties and the <a class="def" href="5.10.845">signs</a> shall be equipped with a device which automatically dims the intensity of the lights during hours of darkness.</p>



</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-6" data-cite="DS-6"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-6.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.275">Electrical signs</a> shall not be permitted. Size of <a class="def" href="5.10.845">signs</a> may be limited to be compatible with nearby <a class="def" href="5.10.780">residential uses</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-7" data-cite="DS-7"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-7.&#x2002;</span></span>An on-site passenger loading area may be required depending on the number of attendees and the extent of the abutting <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a> <a class="def" href="5.10.390">improvements</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-8" data-cite="DS-8"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-8.&#x2002;</span></span>The location of parking and passenger loading areas shall be designed to reduce impacts on nearby <a class="def" href="5.10.780">residential uses</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-9" data-cite="DS-9"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-9.&#x2002;</span></span>One <a class="def" href="5.10.640">pedestal sign</a> with a <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> having electronic programming is allowed at a fire station only if:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-9a" data-cite="DS-9a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> displays messages regarding public service announcements or City events only;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-9b" data-cite="DS-9b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> is turned off between 10:00 p.m. and 6:00 a.m. except during emergencies;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-9c" data-cite="DS-9c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>It is located to have the least impact on surrounding residential properties.</p>



<p>If it is determined that the electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> constitutes a traffic hazard for any reason, the <a class="def" href="5.10.660">Planning and Building Director</a> may impose additional conditions.</p>
</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-10" data-cite="DS-10"><p class="heading"><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-10.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.275">Electrical signs</a> shall be permitted at junior high/middle <a class="def" href="5.10.824">schools</a> and high <a class="def" href="5.10.824">schools</a>. One <a class="def" href="5.10.640">pedestal sign</a> with a <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> having electronic programming is allowed per site only if:</p>



<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-10a" data-cite="DS-10a"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">a.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> displays messages regarding public service announcements or <a class="def" href="5.10.824">school</a> events only;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-10b" data-cite="DS-10b"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">b.&#x2002;</span></span>The electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> is turned off between 10:00 p.m. and 6:00 a.m.;</p>



</section>
<section class="subsec subsec2 chunking-none type-UseSubsec2" id="15.40-DS-10c" data-cite="DS-10c"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">c.&#x2002;</span></span>The <a class="def" href="5.10.824">school</a> is located on a collector or arterial <a class="def" href="5.10.900">street</a>.</p>



<p>The City shall review and approve the location of the <a class="def" href="5.10.845">sign</a> on the site. The <a class="def" href="5.10.845">sign</a> shall be located to have the least impact on surrounding residential properties. If it is determined that a proposed electronic <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a> would constitute a traffic hazard the <a class="def" href="5.10.660">Planning and Building Director</a> may impose restrictions or deny the <a class="def" href="5.10.757">readerboard</a>.</p>
</section>
</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-11" data-cite="DS-11"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-11.&#x2002;</span></span><a class="def" href="5.10.275">Electrical signs</a> shall not be permitted.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-12" data-cite="DS-12"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-12.&#x2002;</span></span>An on-site passenger loading area must be provided. The City shall determine the appropriate size of the loading area on a case-by-case basis, depending on the number of attendees and the extent of the abutting <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a> <a class="def" href="5.10.390">improvements</a>. Carpooling, staggered loading/unloading time, <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a> <a class="def" href="5.10.390">improvements</a> or other means may be required to reduce traffic impacts on nearby <a class="def" href="5.10.780">residential uses</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-13" data-cite="DS-13"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-13.&#x2002;</span></span>An on-site passenger loading area must be provided. The City shall determine the appropriate size of the loading area on a case-by-case basis, depending on the number of attendees and the extent of the abutting <a class="def" href="5.10.805">right-of-way</a> <a class="def" href="5.10.390">improvements</a>. The location of parking and passenger loading areas shall be designed to reduce impacts on nearby <a class="def" href="5.10.780">residential uses</a>.</p>


</section>
<section class="subsec subsec1 chunking-none type-DSSubsec1" id="15.40-DS-14" data-cite="DS-14"><p><span class="header num-only"><span class="num">DS-14.&#x2002;</span></span>See RSA General Regulation 1 (KZC <a class="cite" href="15.10.030(1)" title="15.10.030(1)">15.10.030(1)</a>) and KZC <a class="cite" href="15.05.020(3)" title="15.05.020(3)">15.05.020(3)</a>. <span class="note history history--linked" data-action="click-&gt;levelnodes#openHistory">(Ord. 4913, 2025; Ord. 4506 &#xA7;&#xA0;2, 2015; Ord. 4476 &#xA7;&#xA0;2, 2015)</span></p>



</section>





</article>
</article>
</div>

</main>
<div class="pagelink pagelink--next" data-controller="pagelink">

class="pagelink-link btn btn-lg btn-primary"
href="/KZC/20"
title="Ch. 20, Medium Density Residential Zones"
>
<span class="pagelink-text">Ch. 20</span>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-arrow-right" aria-hidden="true"></span>
</a>
</div>


</div>
</div>
</div>

</div>





<div class="sitefooter-disclaimer">
<p><b>The Kirkland Zoning Code is current through Ordinance 4924, passed February 3, 2026.</b></p>
<p>Disclaimer: The city clerk&#x2019;s office has the official version of the Kirkland Zoning Code. Users should contact the city clerk&#x2019;s office for ordinances passed subsequent to the ordinance cited above.</p>

</div>

id="large-view"
class="largeviewmodal modal fade"
role="dialog"
tabindex="-1"
data-controller="largeviewmodal"
>
<div class="largeviewmodal-dialog modal-dialog modal-xl" role="document">

<div class="largeviewmodal-header modal-header">

<h1 class="modal-title for-files">View Full File</h1>

type="button"
class="close"
aria-label="Close"
data-dismiss="modal"
><span aria-hidden="true">&times;</span></button>
</div>

<div class="largeviewmodal-body modal-body main" data-largeviewmodal-target="modalBody">
</div>

<div class="largeviewmodal-footer modal-footer">
<button
type="button"
class="btn btn-default pull-left large-view-scroll-top"
title="Go to Top"
data-action="largeviewmodal#scrollModal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-arrow-up" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Go to Top</span>
</button>

type="button"
class="btn btn-default pull-left large-view-scroll-bottom"
title="Go to Bottom"
data-action="largeviewmodal#scrollModal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-arrow-down" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Go to Bottom</span>
</button>
<a
href
class="btn btn-default share"
role="button"
title="Share/Save"
data-action="largeviewmodal#shareContent"
data-largeviewmodal-target="share"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-disk-export" aria-hidden="true"></span> <span>Share/Save</span>
</a>
<button
type="button"
class="btn btn-default"
title="Close"
data-dismiss="modal"
>
<span class="glyphicons glyphicons-remove d-inline d-sm-none" aria-hidden="true"></span>
<span class="d-none d-sm-inline">Close</span>
</button>
</div>

</div>
</div>
</aside>

class="subsecnodeactions subsec-actions d-print-none d-none d-sm-block invisible"
